name: Russ Feingold
subject: Long shot
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
When I first ran for the Wisconsin State Senate, pundits called it a long shot. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d0d/2892254318/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema") Friend, When I first ran for the Wisconsin State Senate, pundits called it a long shot. I was up against a sitting senator in a solidly Republican district. Everyone thought we had a snowball's chance in hell. But my family, friends, supporters, and I poured everything we had into our campaign. My grassroots team donated what they could, and volunteered every chance they got. I knocked on thousands and thousands (and thousands!) of doors. Then, the race started getting close. Our hard work was paying off. And, in the end, after a recount, we won by _just 31 votes._ **You know what won that race? The conversations my team and I had with voters.** **We need your help in this race, today. There's not much time until Election Day, and we need to make sure our get-out-the-vote program is fully funded.[Can you make a donation of $5 right now so our field team can knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and speak with more voters here in Wisconsin?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d0d/2892254318/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d0a/2892254318/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d0b/2892254318/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d08/2892254318/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d09/2892254318/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Recent polls showed me within the margin of error of my opponent, and right-wing groups are pouring millions into Wisconsin to make sure we don't win. Team, we can't afford to let up for one moment.
Thanks for all of your hard work.
Sincerely,
Russ Feingold
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d0d/2892254318/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-11-02_donate_wi-nd-rs&utm_campaign=donate&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d06/2892254318/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d07/2892254318/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d04/2892254318/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4698/1c469400/10ea52e/3544d05/2892254318/VEsHBA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). name: URGENT (via DSCC)
subject: Democrats PLUMMETING?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We either bolster a swift ground game operation tonight or we lose on Tuesday. There's no reason to exaggerate when polls show six races within two points or less. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-UrgentDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
_**McConnell 's Super PAC To Drop ANOTHER $12 MILLION Into Six States (CNN)**_
[**A grassroots response is our last hope! Please pitch in ASAP >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-UrgentDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Things are moving quickly: Friend:

1. _**FIRST**_ : McConnell's special interests plowed an additional $12 MILLION into must-win races -- after a trio of right-wing PACs already spent **$165 MILLION to buy the Senate!**

2. _**THEN**_ : Nate Silver and the _New York Times_ were forced to recalculate their projections -- and our chances **PLUMMETED 10 points in the past 10 days.**

3. _**NOW**_ : Top Democrats like First Lady Michelle Obama, Vice President Biden, and Harry Reid know it'll take [**one final grassroots surge to turn the tide.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-UrgentDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Friend, we either bolster a swift ground game operation tonight or we lose on Tuesday.** There's no need to exaggerate when polls show SIX races within two points.

**Our candidates have never needed you more. Will you pitch in a grassroots gift to help Democrats mount a ground game SURGE across the map and take back the majority?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-UrgentDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. President Obama is right when he says our progress is on the ballot -- and flipping the Senate is the only way to protect:
* Social Security
* Marriage equality
* Women's reproductive rights
* Healthcare for 20 million Americans
* And so much more (including the Supreme Court!)

[**With stakes like that, we can 't risk falling short! Friend, will you boost our Democratic ground game now that it matters most?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-UrgentDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e8fa/2b07114c/4fcb2c1e/73577ce0/2446604034/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: sounding the alarm (this could cost us the election)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7684/250471684/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7684/250471684/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Alarm bells should be going off, team.
We're just FIVE days away from the election, our fundraising is lagging, and nearly all of the polls are calling this race, which will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, a virtual TIE:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7685/250471684/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Time is running out to turn this thing around. Right now, we're allocating funds for the last couple of days and if we miss today's fundraising goal, we're going to have to cut back in places that could cost us this election.
Team -- DON'T LET THAT HAPPEN. [**Grassroots supporters like you are our only hope for pulling out a win, so please give $3 or more right now so that we can lock in the resources we need to elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, take back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7685/250471684/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7686/250471684/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7687/250471684/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7680/250471684/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7685/250471684/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Look, EVERYTHING is riding on our race (control of the Senate, the balance of the Supreme Court...) and you and I and the rest of this team have worked too hard to come up short at the very end.
I don't know about you, but I really don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing we had dug just a little bit deeper or raised just a little bit more money. [**Please, if you do one thing today to help Democrats win back the Senate, donate $3 or more to Maggie's campaign right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7685/250471684/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for helping out in the final days. Really appreciate having you on the team.
Marc Goldberg
Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc41/2a380d31/14d0631a/ff7685/250471684/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAzXzVEYXlzNl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161103_5Days6_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

"" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Look, EVERYTHING is riding on our race (control of the Senate, the balance of the Supreme Court...) and you and I and the rest of this team have worked too hard to come up short at the very end. I don't know about you, but I really don't want to wake up on November 9 wishing we had dug just a little bit deeper or raised just a little bit more money. "" Thanks for helping out in the final days. Really appreciate having you on the team. Marc Goldberg Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH ""

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Flashback: Minter Champions a Tax on Minivans, SUVs, Work Trucks
body:
| | | **MINTER CHAMPIONED A NEW TAX ON MINIVANS, SUV’s & TRUCKS**
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9dafa02f7b&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| |
**SUE MINTER REFUSES (AGAIN) TO SAY IF SHE WOULD VETO A CARBON TAX...**

**ALSO CHAMPIONED A NEW TAX ON MINIVANS, SUV’s & WORK TRUCKS**
| **“Sue Minter** supports a **regional carbon tax** on gas and heating fuel that could add as much as $.88 to each gallon; **new sales taxes** on services; new **‘cap and trade’ fees** on transportation that added $.11 to each gallon of gas in another state; **tolls** on Vermont’s highways; **higher payroll taxes** ; and **higher banking fees**. She also refused, once again, to say in Thursday night’s VPR debate if she would veto a state carbon tax (probably because one of her largest donors told Seven Days she is expected to sign it).

“But somehow, in the flurry of taxes and fees she has promised to raise – and those she has refused to oppose – **Sue Minter** was hoping Vermonters would overlook another new tax she championed in the Legislature: a tax on minivans, SUV’s and work trucks.

“In the Legislature, **Phil Scott opposed Sue Minter’s tax on minivans**. This is just more evidence that Vermonters cannot afford Sue Minter’s anti-affordability agenda.” **\-- Brittney Wilson, Campaign Spokeswoman, Phil Scott for Vermont**
---

**THE FACTS ABOUT SUE MINTER’S MINI-VAN TAX**
As a member of the House Transportation Committee, **Sue Minter** advocated for – and voted for – H.540, legislation to create a so-called “gas guzzler” tax on minivans, SUV’s and work trucks.

The Legislation went from **Sue Minter’s committee** to the Appropriations committee, where the tax on mini-vans, SUV’s and work trucks was removed because of outcry from the public. When the Legislation reached the floor of the House, an amendment was made by then Representative **David Zuckerman** to add the tax back into the bill. **Sue Minter** voted for that amendment to add it back into to bill.

In stark contrast, then Senator **Phil Scott** worked to have the tax removed from the final version of the bill.

Sources:
House Bill 540: [http://www.leg.state.vt.us/docs/legdoc.cfm?URL=/docs/2008/bills/intro/H-540.HTM](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=1e52efbe0c&e=19cebfe173)
House Journal April 18th, 2007
http://www.leg.state.vt.us/docs/legdoc.cfm?URL=/docs/2008/journal/hj070418.htm
###
| | | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c8aaefbbb3&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0c5625c5d8&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=72f6b3a245&e=19cebfe173)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2016 Phil Scott for Vermont, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you have signed up to receive updates from Phil Scott for Vermont.

**Our mailing address is:**
Phil Scott for Vermont46 Three Mile Bridge RoadMiddlesex, Vt 05602
[Add us to your address book](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=9dafa02f7b)

name: preston@dscc.org
subject: Nate Silver: 0 for 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm telling you from experience: GOP Super PACs are counting on us to "relax" while they swoop in and swing close races in their favor. [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- I have to tell you something.

I was on the front lines of Senate races in 2010, 2012, and 2014. **And Nate Silver? He was 0 for 3 in predicting their outcomes.**

So when people tell me to "relax" because his model says our chances look good _**(with no less than SIX tied races on the line)**_ I practically lose it! I'm glad he underestimated us in 2012, but in 2014 **he predicted we 'd win North Carolina by a point... and we lost.**

**We can take NOTHING for granted. There are six tied races and we need to flip four GOP seats to win the Senate. Please pitch in what you can to fuel the strongest ground game we 've ever run:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Here's how close these races are projected to be:
\- Jason Kander (Missouri): +0.2%
\- Deborah Ross (North Carolina): -0.9%
\- Maggie Hassan (New Hampshire): +0.7%
\- Catherine Cortez Masto (Nevada): +1.3% Trust me, I'm telling you from experience, GOP Super PACs are counting on us to "relax" while they swoop in and swing these races in their favor.

We can't afford anything less than full grassroots support. It will determine who has the Senate majority. [**Can I count on you to pitch in $1 or whatever you can right now to win?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161103-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for standing with us,
Preston Elliott
DSCC Deputy Executive Director

Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. All, we've missed our fundraising goals a couple of days in a row.
The election is Tuesday, and we're running out of time to make up ground. We're locking in our final budgets for our get out the vote efforts and right now we don't have the resources we need to fund our plan.
**Team -- we need to raise an additional $15,000, and we need to do it ASAP.**
You're one of Governor Hassan's top supporters, so we're asking you directly: [**Donate $3 or more right now so that we can shore up our fundraising, talk to more voters, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7715/3707308455/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7716/3707308455/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7717/3707308455/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7710/3707308455/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or, click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7715/3707308455/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
EVERYTHING -- the Senate majority and the balance of the Supreme Court -- is riding on our race here in New Hampshire.
**Nate Silver says that voters here have 18x more power to determine Senate control than the average American voter and right now, polling averages show that we would LOSE.**
Grassroots supporters like you giving everything you can for this final push is the ONLY way we'll secure the funds we need to elect Maggie, win back the Senate, and ensure that our next Supreme Court justices work for all of us, not just those at the top. [**Please, donate $3 -- every dollar you can -- right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc5d/2a380d31/14d58314/ff7715/3707308455/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0XzZkYXlzMS1SU19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_6days1-RS_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for digging deep for the home stretch.
Team Maggie

body:
Earn your spot on our wall. This is a HUGE opportunity. |
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38550281:sMd_mvuNC:m:1:1155937413:61F72B47516E3D68B526EC0087692A17:r)

Peter,

I want to share something special with you.

I am dedicating a wall at campaign HQ in Trump Tower for a select group of donors who chose to step up during the final stretch of the most important election of our lifetime.

But space is LIMITED. We can only fit 2,000 more names on the wall, so you'll need to act fast.

[**Please make a contribution of at least $49 to earn your spot on the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38550281:sMd_mvuNC:m:1:1155937413:61F72B47516E3D68B526EC0087692A17:r)

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38550281:sMd_mvuNC:m:1:1155937413:61F72B47516E3D68B526EC0087692A17:r)

---

The names on our TRUMP Donor Wall are the men and women who've chipped in whatever they can to save our country.

Most campaigns only ever recognize the biggest donors. But this campaign is about more than money. Ours is a movement fueled by patriots -- hardworking, tough Americans who know what it takes to win this election and win for our country.

These patriots humble me. They remind me why I get up every single day to fight for America.

I'm inviting you to join them during the final hour of the most important election of our lifetime.

[**Please make a contribution of $49 to add your name to the TRUMP Donor Wall.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/38550281:sMd_mvuNC:m:1:1155937413:61F72B47516E3D68B526EC0087692A17:r)

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: New memo 11/04/16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
UPDATED map detailing our path to victory. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38546972:Wz5p2vuSN:m:1:876315805:475F7B39CA45D9B79CFD00C44B1A1F9A:r)
Peter,

You're going to like this. My team has written an UPDATED memo detailing the current state of the race below.

It shows you the progress we've made over the last two weeks as well as what we STILL need to do to deliver a big win in **just 4 days.**

_Just like before, I 've highlighted the key parts that you **NEED** to know at this point in the race._

[**After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 4 days from today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38546972:Wz5p2vuSN:m:1:876315805:475F7B39CA45D9B79CFD00C44B1A1F9A:r)

TO: Peter Willis
FROM: Brad Parscale, Digital Director
RE: *UPDATED* Path to 270 Electoral Votes

I've updated the map below to reflect our internal polling. Red states are still considered safe Trump states. Blue states fit safely in Hillary's column. Gray states are toss-ups, but the _**new addition of pink states show where our hard work has been paying off the most.**_
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38546972:Wz5p2vuSN:m:1:876315805:475F7B39CA45D9B79CFD00C44B1A1F9A:r)
As you can see above, we have strengthened our leads in six battleground states: **Florida** , **Ohio** , **Iowa** , **Maine** , **North** **Carolina** , and **Nevada**. If this trend continues until Election Day, _we can bank on 266 electoral votes._

From there, we only need _**ONE**_ of the following states to win (in order of where we're doing best): Colorado, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, Virginia, New Mexico, or Minnesota.

With a clear path to victory, we just announced an aggressive $25 million final ad-buy in the 13 most winnable battleground states. Tightening polls have even **forced Hillary to make her first-ever ad-buy in Wisconsin.**

With ObamaCare falling apart, our sharpened focus on the issues, and the FBI's reopening of their investigation into Hillary's emails, _Donald Trump has shot up in national polls_ while **Hillary is losing momentum even in traditionally blue states** of Minnesota and New Mexico.

I say this with full confidence: _we can win this election._
###
_We cannot rest until every single one of those pink states is red_ \-- and we pick up at least ONE more toss-up state. I won't stop fighting now. _And I hope you 'll step up with me at the final hour._

We're so close to winning, but it's not in the bag. With just 4 days left, I need you to step up at this critical moment to help fund our last-minute ad-buy and get-out-the-vote ground game.

**Because you 've been such a critical supporter, you'll once again be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in.**

[**Please step up with a contribution to help us reach 270 electoral votes and WIN this election for America.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38546972:Wz5p2vuSN:m:1:876315805:475F7B39CA45D9B79CFD00C44B1A1F9A:r)

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38546972:Wz5p2vuSN:m:1:876315805:475F7B39CA45D9B79CFD00C44B1A1F9A:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
---

For more information [click here](http://email.bencarson.com/p/iWz5p2vuSN). [Update your preferences](http://email.bencarson.com/p/oWz5p2vuSN)

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Final Link of the Week: VOTE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_This is our final Link of the Week email -- the things that we've shared around the office, and we thought everyone on Team Maggie should know about. We hope you've enjoyed clicking around as much as we have, and thanks again for your support!_
Well, folks, here we go. In just 4 short days, we'll cast our ballots to elect Governor Maggie Hassan. Recent polls show that Maggie's race to unseat Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte, a corporate special interest rubber stamp, is locked in the margin of error, and CNN called it "the truest of toss-ups."
**Team, we need you to do three things ASAP:**
1\. Go to **[iwillvote.com](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc57/2a380d31/14cbda7b/ff771b/3597493013/VEsH/ "https://www.iwillvote.com/home/")** to check your polling place and make sure you know where you're going on Election Day.
2\. Tell all your friends to go to **[iwillvote.com](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc57/2a380d31/14cbda7b/ff771b/3597493013/VEsE/ "https://www.iwillvote.com/home/")** to make sure they're also ready to vote.
3\. **_Vote on Tuesday._** There's _way_ too much at stake in this election to sit it out.
This team has been working so hard this year to help elect Maggie and take back the Senate. We can't let all our efforts go to waste. It's go time, and we're counting on you.
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- We need help turning out all the votes for Maggie that we can in these final days, and to do that we need a fully funded get out the vote operation. **[Donate $3 or more right now to ensure that we have what we need to clinch this race for Maggie so she can fight for our families in the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc57/2a380d31/14cbda7b/ff7705/3597493013/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0X0xPVFdfbmgiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_LOTW_nh&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Ben Carson
subject: Make your faith matter this election
body:
It's almost here. It's not too late to make your faith matter!

View this email in your browser.

Dear Peter,

Every election in the last 25 years has been
decided by less than 10 million votes. But did you know that an
estimated 25 million evangelical Christians didn't vote in 2012?

As biblically bound followers of Jesus we
must allow our beliefs to guide our vote.

Let the non-partisan organization
MyFaithVotes help you make your faith matter this election.

Pledge to vote on Tuesday and invite others
to do the same!

If you are looking for voting assistance,
make sure to check out My Faith Votes' voter tools for:

Party Platform Comparisons
Finding Your Polling Location
Voting Made Easy Interactive Tools
Inspirational Quotes & Scriptures

In Christ,

Ben Carson
My Faith Votes

subject: Vision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

When Mr. Trump decided to run for president, he had a vision. He started his campaign with the intention to make America great again. Today, this is a vision recognized around the world.
To make his vision a reality, we [**need your help this weekend**](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fdocs.google.com-252Fforms-252Fd-252F1VnlUM05EwW8eVjhtBYoGsYxVypsRUhZIhw5ew8NKabQ-252Fedit-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Ddjtvafinal4day-26n-3D1-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DDhwm8htd-5aj5l1xLbrvyGwCpWWBT6C52QyT7RUCKKk%26s%3DlTQrytG1v8ex8bB7s6W9BnfDtSZ9pP2X3OiZnRuOgKk%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=djtfinal4day5&n=1). There are _four days_ before the polls open in Virginia. We have _four days_ to inform our neighbors of Mr. Trump's vision for a better America.
Can Mr. Trump count on you to help him get across the finish line this Election Day?
To join the movement, [**click here** and become a member of Team Trump](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fdocs.google.com-252Fforms-252Fd-252F1VnlUM05EwW8eVjhtBYoGsYxVypsRUhZIhw5ew8NKabQ-252Fedit-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Ddjtvafinal4day-26n-3D2-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DDhwm8htd-5aj5l1xLbrvyGwCpWWBT6C52QyT7RUCKKk%26s%3DGCAYJXPZDhEiTsdZ-H3_sY6qXryl4SPL8FrbavqZkaY%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=djtfinal4day5&n=2).
We cannot win without you!
Many of you have joined the team already and the entire Trump campaign thanks you for all of your efforts. But the work is not done yet! We need to ensure we get out the vote for Mr. Trump this Tuesday.
[**Click here to help Trump win the White House!**](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fdocs.google.com-252Fforms-252Fd-252F1VnlUM05EwW8eVjhtBYoGsYxVypsRUhZIhw5ew8NKabQ-252Fedit-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Ddjtvafinal4day-26n-3D3-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DDhwm8htd-5aj5l1xLbrvyGwCpWWBT6C52QyT7RUCKKk%26s%3DaBdcyHL6QPGpkE7C-F90jVo6OOR7Rd1noPMldoBdCIY%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=djtfinal4day5&n=3)
****
Every phone call, every door knock contributes to a massive victory on Election Night.
Join the team and contribute to the movement **TODAY!**
****
On to victory!

Trump Team Virginia

And the final Marquette poll has Russ at 45-44 against Senator Johnson.** Russ's marching orders are to "work like we're a couple of points down" and every one of us on Team Russ is working day and night to execute our get-out-the-vote push. name: JayInslee.com
subject: re: Bringing it home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We must close strong.

Dear Friend,

Did you see Jay's email?

We know millions of Washingtonians have yet to return their ballots. So we're doing an all out push to make sure we end strong on Tuesday. We all know there's a lot riding on this election.

That's why we're working around the clock to ensure Democrats vote and return their ballots. No assumptions -- and nothing left to chance.

Please help us reach more Democrats by making a donation now.

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTgxNTAxMgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA0MDI5Nzc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

With so many ballots yet to be returned, we're leaving it all on the field -- and we hope you'll join us in this movement!

Team Inslee

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, Nov 3, 2016
Subject: Bringing it home

Dear Friend,

Five days to go!

There's nothing like the energy and excitement we're seeing in cities and towns all across our state during the final days of the campaign -- but we still need your help reaching every possible voter, that's why I'm coming directly to you to ask for $10:

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTgxNTAxMgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA0MDI5Nzc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

I'm spending the week firing up volunteers and talking with voters about the decision we face in Washington this election. We've been working to build an economy that works for every Washington family, made big investments in education, and taken steps to combat climate change. We have a lot to be proud of, and more work to do to build off our accomplishments in the next four years. That's the message we want voters to hear in these last five days.

Republican Bill Bryant thinks that by barraging Washington voters with false, negative attacks in this final week, he can squeak out a victory on Tuesday.

That why I'm not taking anything for granted -- I'm going to give these last five days everything I've got, and I hope you will too.

That's why I'm asking, with five days to go: Will you contribute immediately to support our statewide Get Out the Vote efforts?

Your contribution will support our GOTV operation as our field team and hundreds of dedicated volunteers work to make sure Democrats are voting for governor and other races up and down the ballot. I want to make sure we can continue to build on our progress.

Help us bring home victory on Election Day. Thank you for working so hard.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTgxNTAxMgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTA0MDI5Nzc1NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9815012&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA0MDI5Nzc1NwS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. All content (c) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved 2016.

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

Privacy Policy http://jayinslee.com/privacy

Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

subject: BREAKING: McConnell PANICKING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e17/738133e4/339f69d3/7f8585b4/447641646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104?refcode=pme161104_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| **CNN: McConnell super PAC to drop $12 million to save majority, includes Florida** Get this guys -- Mitch McConnell must've seen the new CNN poll that has us locked in a one point race with Rubio. **His Super PAC just announced their plan to flood Senate races with ANOTHER $12 million dollars -- including $3 million here in Florida** \-- on top of the millions his and other right-wing super PACs are already spending!

This is a desperate attempt to save his Senate majority. McConnell knows just how tight this race is, and we bet he's panicking. He'll do anything to try and hang onto this Senate seat for his puppet Marco Rubio. We can't let him win. [**Can you chip in now to defeat him?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e17/738133e4/339f69d3/7f8585b5/447641646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104?refcode=pme161104_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

This race could be the one we need to win back Senate control from McConnell -- and we're within one point. We have to raise more money if we want to turn the Senate blue. We know you're hearing from us a lot, but we really need you. [**Please contribute >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e17/738133e4/339f69d3/7f8585b5/447641646/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104?refcode=pme161104_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Thank you,
Murphy HQ

body:

[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddae/2a380d31/14cc8d8f/ff7534/172850600/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0X0VQRi0xX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_EPF-1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
With the election less than a week away an incredible opportunity for... |

Friend, This is your last opportunity to have your support of Donald J. Trump and our candidates for the Senate and the House triple matched before Election Day. I sincerely hope you will take advantage today. I just heard from Chairman Priebus and a small group of generous supporters who are fed up with the deceitful, vicious attack ads they’re seeing from Hillary Clinton and her liberal allies. Furthermore, they are disgusted with the mainstream media seemingly taking their orders from the Clinton camp. This group has decided to step forward right now and triple match any donation made before midnight tonight. Friend, that means your gift today of $55 will be immediately triple matched for a real impact of $220. The money we are able to raise during this final triple match will be put into our advertising and critical Get-Out-the-Vote operation, which will be pivotal in electing Republicans up and down the ballot. I chose to write you Friend, because I know you are committed to winning the White House and keeping our majorities in Congress. You also know what we’re up against and what it will take to win in less than one week. So please take action right now with your generous contribution of $25, $55, $100, or even $250. Remember the triple match is ONLY in effect until midnight so please act today. Thank you, Newt Gingrich P.S. Friend, as long as you give before midnight, every dollar you donate will be triple matched by a group of supporters. Please help us fund our final GOTV operations before it’s too late. CONTRIBUTE $55

name: Gov. Scott Walker
subject: I'm with Bill Cole
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
---
| Friend --

Bill Cole is the right candidate for Governor! Last week, I had the privilege of traveling across West Virginia and meeting many of you. I heard your stories; your hopes and concerns... and that is why I am proud to support my friend, Bill Cole, for Governor of West Virginia. Bill is a small business owner, and conservative through and through. West Virginia would greatly benefit with Bill Cole as governor. As president of the West Virginia Senate, Bill has proven he is a conservative leader -- a trusted voice in regulatory reform, and a job creator. Look at all that he has done in just two short years to advance common-sense conservative reforms. Visit [BillColeWV.com](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fbillcolewv.com%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_walker&n=1) to see what he has done and what he will do and then figure out how you can help too. Friend, will you join me in helping to elect the first Republican Governor of West Virginia in 15 years? **[Please consider sending an immediate contribution of $25, $75, $150, or even $350 right now.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/scott_walker?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_walker&n=2 "Donate Today")** Bill is running against the state’s only billionaire and a die-hard Hillary Clinton supporter, Jim Justice. I am totally committed to helping elect Bill and to work with him in strengthening West Virginia. Without a doubt, I am proud to be a part of Team Cole! I hope you will consider lending your support to him in helping to advance the conservative cause. **[Please consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to show Bill that you are with him.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/scott_walker?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=scott_walker&n=3 "Donate Today")** Thanks for your support, Scott Walker

name: Joe Biden
subject: asking personally, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The campaign for Senate control is coming down to the wire. That's why Democrats everywhere must come together to help the DSCC deliver a Democratic majority. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab9?refcode=DPE-20161104-Biden-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend, eight years ago today you helped Barack and I win.

They say the entire election came down to that final week - talking to voters, running ads, and getting out the vote. That's how Democrats have gotten it done for decades and it's the only way we can pull it off again on Tuesday.

[**But none of it happens without your support. Will you pitch in for a Democratic victory?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab9?refcode=DPE-20161104-Biden-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The truth is that with polls this tight and dark money flooding in against us, Republicans could save their Senate majority. **Letting them do that risks everything we've fought so hard to accomplish.**

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**November 4, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**PHIL SCOTT: ‘We will focus on the fundamentals of a vibrant economy...’**
_Scott is Only Candidate to Focus On These Core Issues Throughout the Campaign_
**Middlesex, Vt., November 4, 2016 –** A new video released today by Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, emphasizes Scott’s longstanding commitment to making the economy and affordability the top priorities of state government. In the 30-second ad, Scott lays out his vision for Vermont and his approach to driving economic growth that has a meaningful, sustained impact on all Vermonters.

“I’m not willing to sell out Vermont for a short term game,” Scott says. “We need to look beyond ... into the next decade in order to be more self-sufficient. We need to focus on the fundamentals of a vibrant economy. On having a budget where we live within our means,” he continues.

Throughout the campaign, Scott has committed to making the economy and affordability his top priorities, and to responsible budgeting that ends the unsustainable practice of increasingly raising taxes and fees on Vermonters. View his proposals at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d6252e4d23&e=19cebfe173).

“We aren’t going to get out of this by taxing people more, by putting more burden on our citizens. We have the power to change the direction in Vermont, where we can all prosper if we work together,” Scott concludes.

Watch the full video here:

clean_body: "" "" Look, the path to taking back the Senate and securing the Supreme Court runs through New Hampshire, and a poll released YESTERDAY shows that Ayotte is ahead by TWO points. If the election were held right now, we would LOSE our race and hand Senate control to Washington Republicans. Our fundraising has really slowed, and we only have FOUR DAYS left to make up ground. That's why we need to put $75,000 in our Emergency Polling Fund by 5 PM tonight. We just checked -- it looks like you haven't donated to it yet. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for helping out, everyone. Your gift goes a long way in the final push. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Over one million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d98/2546133054/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Our team has a plan to contact over one million Hoosier voters this weekend, Friend. But we'll only be able to hit that goal if we get enough volunteers -- and **we 're still 156 shifts short.**

**[Can you sign up for a volunteer shift to make sure we don't miss our Get Out The Vote numbers this weekend?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d9f/2546133054/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer-november-4") I'm not exaggerating when I say the entire election depends on it. **

I feel good about the campaign we've run. We've shared our positive vision for Indiana and the enthusiastic response has been humbling. It's clear that Hoosiers are tired of the same old partisan bickering in Washington.

But although I hate to say it -- it doesn't amount to much if we fall short on Election Day. And the surest way to disappointment on Election Night is too many of our supporters sitting on the sidelines.

We only have 4 days left, Friend. **This is it.[Can you sign up for a volunteer shift this weekend to get us across the finish line?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d9f/2546133054/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer-november-4")**

Thanks for all you do,

Evan

P.S. **I know can be difficult for some folks to volunteer, but we still need to get resources to our field team.[Please pitch in a few bucks if you can't talk to voters this weekend.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d9e/2546133054/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161104&amount=25")** ** ** ** ** ** ** **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d9e/2546133054/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161104&amount=25")********** ** **
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ff/7be36b49/1e24fd6f/78f98d9d/2546133054/VEsA/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

body:

The bad news...

* _**The Washington Post:**_ "A super PAC allied with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell **poured nearly $12 million into six key swing states as part of its last, major push before Election Day.**

Our best chance in YEARS to take back the majority could be thwarted by this tidal wave of dark money at the last minute -- unless grassroots Democrats step up to save our Senate hopes!

name: Barney Frank
subject: slipping through our fingers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e14/738133e4/3393bae8/7f858540/2006766522/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104bf?refcode=pme161104bf_m&recurring=true&amount=10")
---
| Florida's Senate race is too close, team. But we have the power to change that.

Patrick Murphy is neck-and-neck with Marco Rubio in Florida. He's being massively outspent by right-wing special interest groups, but he's still right on Rubio's tail. **We can 't let this chance slip through our fingers. [Can you give $5 now to help him catch up?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e14/738133e4/3393bae8/7f858540/2006766522/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104bf?refcode=pme161104bf_m&recurring=true&amount=10")**

Patrick will be a great leader for Florida. He's a hard worker and a strong advocate for our shared values. Patrick is committed to fixing our broken immigration system. He will defend a woman's right to choose. He stands with our seniors and will protect Social Security and Medicare. **He 's right on the issues that matter, and he's right for Florida.**

Patrick's opponents have been doing everything they can to stop him. They know he's a very real threat to their control of the Senate. They've tried everything -- from devious push polls, to attacks that have been proven false, to spending millions upon millions of dollars to flood the airways. **But nothing is sticking. He 's so close to winning, but he needs us now to get over the finish line in just 4 days. **[**Can you chip in whatever you can before it 's too late?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e14/738133e4/3393bae8/7f858540/2006766522/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104bf?refcode=pme161104bf_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Barney Frank

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e14/738133e4/3393bae8/7f858541/2006766522/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e14/738133e4/3393bae8/7f858542/2006766522/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

subject: Last chance – less than 100 hours left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Do you realize that Election Day is less than 100 hours away?!
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5794963924818130176/-7377509723865412864) Dear Peter, Do you realize that Election Day is less than 100 hours away?! This weekend is our LAST CHANCE to 'Get Out The Vote', and I need your help! This Saturday, join us for a Rally and Day of Action-a full day of calls, texts, and knocking on doors to help drive Utah voters who want change to the polls! **[Sign up TODAY to help us Get Out The Vote in Utah!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5794963924818130176/-7305452129827484928)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5794963924818130176/-7305452129827484928) Join us at 10:30 a.m. for FREE breakfast, and help us make Saturday our single biggest day of voter contact yet! I'm sure you know by now that my campaign has built the single largest voter contact Field Team that Utah has ever seen. We have reached out over 200 THOUSAND times to individual Utah voters, because like you, I believe that change in Utah needs to start from the bottom up. **[Join us tomorrow and be a part of the largest grassroots effort in Utah's history!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5794963924818130176/-7305452129827484928)** Together with you,
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

name: Erika Brees, ChrisKoster.com
subject: Make this weekend a success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7686242017495087104/4954946452419119104?utm_campaign=fnd_gtvfr2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_161104_fnd_gq_gtvfr2_ndn__eb)

Hey,

Right now, volunteers across the state are gearing up for our last weekend of neighborhood canvasses, phone banks, and Get Out The Vote events across the state. They will be talking with the final undecided voters and making sure everyone knows the clear differences between Chris Koster and Eric Greitens.

The work we do this weekend will determine the results of the election on Tuesday, and we need your support _**right now**_ to make sure it is successful. Every dollar and every minute counts in these final days. If you've been waiting for the right moment to make a contribution, this is it. **Chip in your first $10 or more today -- before it is too late.**

subject: It’s time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Without your support right now, we might end up with Crooked Hillary sitting in the White House. |

It’s time Friend. It’s time to turn this country around, and we know that there’s only one candidate who can do that. Hillary has 30 years of experience, but its the wrong experience. She hasn’t built businesses, met payrolls, turned a profit, and created good paying jobs. Her experience has focused on lining the pockets of the Clinton foundation and supporting a war in Libya that created a terrorist rogue regime. Make sure Hillary doesn’t become your next President by donating $35, $50 or $100 right now. Our economy has suffered long enough Friend. Americans don’t deserve to see their jobs shipped off to Mexico or overseas. And Americans who still have a job, don’t deserve to see their hard earned money being stolen from them from a government that taxes unfairly and spends frivolously. Friend, only my father has the experience America needs to turn this country around. He’ll use his successful business experience to cut down our debt, lower our taxes, and renegotiate deals around the world that place the American worker first. But without your support right now, we might end up with Crooked Hillary sitting in the White House. If you can’t afford 4 years of Hillary, Friend please show me by donating now: I CAN'T AFFORD HILLARY There’s no time to waste Friend, we are calling on all of my father’s supporters to stand with him one more time for this final push to victory. I told my father today that I know he can count on your support. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $35

| Uh oh. Mitch McConnell's Super PAC is pouring ANOTHER three million dollars into our Senate race. Know why he's doing that? He's panicking because we're closing in on Marco Rubio. [**Chip in to help us defeat him >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e15/738133e4/3397cb1f/7f858515/3178969054/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104pm?refcode=pme161104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

We're really jeopardizing GOP control of the Senate. They've seen the latest CNN poll with our race locked in a dead heat 49-48% -- we closed an eleven point gap since September! [**Contribute to help us turn this tied race into a win!**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e15/738133e4/3397cb1f/7f858515/3178969054/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104pm?refcode=pme161104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

It's no wonder Rubio's slipping in the polls, even with all this money from special interest backers. In the past few weeks, he:
* got called out by President Obama and Secretary Clinton
* lost the endorsements of all of Florida's major newspapers
* and voted early for sexual abuser Donald Trump

[**I think Florida deserves better. Give now if you agree.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e15/738133e4/3397cb1f/7f858515/3178969054/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161104pm?refcode=pme161104pm_m&recurring=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Patrick

body:
Our work RIGHT NOW will determine the outcome on Election Day. Please JOIN Team Trump with an emergency contribution. |

Friend, Are you standing with me in this this historic race for the White House? I hope you are – because I know that together, we can take on the entire rigged political establishment and WIN. But with 4 days to go I need your EMERGENCY HELP to fund our get-out-the-vote program. This effort will make the difference between victory and defeat on Election Day. JOIN Team Trump today with a $10, $20, $50 or $100 contribution – we need you on board now more than ever, to help put us over the top to victory. MAKE $10 EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION MAKE $20 EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION MAKE $50 EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION MAKE $100 EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION MAKE AN EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION I am running for our nation’s highest office to get to work for you in Washington. I know that with my fantastic supporters like you, we can end the corruption and Make America Great Again! But first we must win HUGE on Election Day – and nothing is more important right now than our get-out-the-vote work in key battlegrounds. It’s simple. We have the momentum and all of the enthusiasm in this race, and if we mobilize our voters effectively I know we’ll win. Help me close strong. Help me win on November 8th so I can get to work for you in the White House. Please don’t delay in joining Team Trump – every contribution will help get more voters to the polls. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. I’m ready to get to work for you in Washington, but first we must win huge on Election Day – just 4 days away. JOIN with your most generous possible contribution today. MAKE $100 EMERGENCY GOTV CONTRIBUTION

name: James Carville
subject: a world of trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Wish I had better news, but the polls are tighter than ever and this election comes down to what we do right now. Democrats risk everything if we don't go all-in for a final surge. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend, I taught my girls early on that there's no such thing as a re-do.

Well it was really them who taught me! They refused to go easy on their old man when we'd play board games. Needless to say, I'd yell and beg for a do-over but they always held firm: "There's no re-dos in the Game of Life, Dad!" **Ain 't that the damn truth!**

[**Elections are no different. That 's why I need you to pitch in a last-minute gift to help the DSCC deliver a Democratic majority on Tuesday. If we don't go all-in, we lose everything!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

If we ease up as Republicans surge, nothing will stop the Party of Trump from monopolizing the map. We've seen that McConnell doesn't have a clue how to run the Senate -- but if we can't flip four seats, he'll keep his majority while we lose everything we've accomplished.

There's no re-do come Tuesday. And if we fall short, we're in for a world of trouble. The GOP made their move by throwing $37 million on the board, now let's make ours.

**Friend, with polls tied, this election comes down to what we do right now. Will you pitch in ASAP so Democrats can finish strong and take back the Senate on Tuesday? **

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

If we succeed, McConnell will likely throw a big ol' tantrum and try to flip the board over -- [**but with your help, the only thing flipping will be the Senate!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-carville?refcode=DPE-20161104-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Let's finish this,
James Carville

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e8a5/2b07114c/4c6ff7bd/73584b03/935672234/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Chambers=2C=20EricGreitens.com?=
subject: Hillary Clinton, Planned Parenthood & Communist Party vs. You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
As you know, conservative leaders from all over the state and country have come forward to support our campaign. Mike Pence, Ben Carson, Scott Walker, Ted Cruz, Rob O'Neill, the Navy SEAL who killed Osama bin Laden, Medal of Honor winners, and more have endorsed Eric Greitens.

You also know that Chris Koster has the support of Hillary Clinton, who has come to Missouri to endorse him and given him $500,000 to support her liberal agenda.

Today, Chris Koster got support from two other infamous institutions.

It was revealed today that in addition to Hillary Clinton, Planned Parenthood (https://twitter.com/momoney2016/status/794565374712881152?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) is funding Chris Koster's campaign for governor. The Missouri Ethics Commission reported that Chris Koster is taking five figures from this radical pro-abortion group.

Then, Chris Koster received another major endorsement: the Communist Party USA! (https://www.facebook.com/cpusa/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) According to the communists, "Similar to Donald Trump, Greitens wraps himself in the mantle of an outsider" while Chris Koster would "give progressives a much-needed boost."

Eric is proud to be feared by communists, abortionists, and Hillary Clinton. Is Chris Koster proud to be beloved by them?

Chris Koster's picked his side. He's got corrupt cronies like Hillary Clinton, Planned Parenthood, and even the Communist Party. But we've got you.

Eric's going to have our back as governor. But he needs you to have his back in these final days of the campaign. Sign up to help us Get Out The Vote (https://ericgreitens.com/gotv/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) and defeat Chris Koster, the official candidate of Planned Parenthood, Hillary Clinton, and the Communist Party.

On To Victory,
AC

Austin Chambers

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=2b86703963) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=2b86703963-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-2b86703963-99411629) with us!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Evans?=
subject: An update from Governor Dan Evans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=29c7931462&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

We are just a few days Election Day, I’m reaching out to give you an update on Bill Bryant’s campaign for Governor.

As you well know by now, we haven’t had a republican in the Governor’s Office in 32 years. As a result, the revolving door of democratic appointments has led to the inexcusable mismanagement we’ve been seeing in state departments like WSDOT and the Department of Corrections.

This election can turn that around.

Your next governor will have about 2,500 appointments he can make. If elected, Bill Bryant will break the cycle that has left our state marred by scandal and falling short on fulfilling its paramount duty – educating our young people, who will someday be our leaders.

Think of how close Dino Rossi came in 2008 – if we’re in recount territory again, which is quite possible considering the latest polls, we want to know that we did everything we could to send a leader to Olympia.

Bill has phone banks across the state, volunteers are knocking on doors in every county, and his effective commercials are up on TV and online. His campaign is making sure that everyone is reminded to turn in their ballot.

Bill is also a team player. His campaign is collaborating with the campaigns of State House and State Senate candidates across our state – and holding the Senate majority right now is so very important. As governor, I know he will continue to work with the legislature, and after watching Inslee’s combative tactics prevent real solutions from coming to fruition, we know how important that is.

Please, don’t sit this one out. Don’t stop with just sending in your own ballot. Go the extra mile by opening your contacts and reminding your friends and family to vote. Talk about it with your coworkers. Tell them about Bill, his plan to fix our broken education system, our preventable traffic jams, and his unwavering opposition to a statewide income tax. 12% of voters are still undecided, and some of them might be in your rolodex.

What the poll released last week shows us is that Bill has come so far already – within just a few small points, despite being outspent so drastically by his opponent. Jay Inslee can spend his millions, but that 12% is still up for grabs. They’ve seen four years of an Inslee Administration and they aren’t impressed, so now is our chance. If you can help Bill out with some extra resources, we can reach out to those undecided voters.

An individual or company can give up to $2,000 to the campaign. Any amount you can give will help him. **[Here is a link to Bill’s donation page](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=3b276f8d7c&e=32f1a3df98).**

_Please consider how it will feel to know you helped Bill finish strong._ Bill has shown his commitment to this state, and now we need to do the same.

Thank you for standing with me in support of Bill.

**Governor Dan Evans**
---
| | | | | | | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=54cf88f7b0&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=85b408ae42&e=32f1a3df98)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: URGENT - FUND THIS AD BLITZ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
With less than a week left until Election Day, this is where we urgently need your help the most. |

It's been a great week, Friend. My father’s poll numbers are rising, the crowds at the rallies are enthusiastic and getting bigger and bigger every city we go to, and every stop we make, we’re greeted by patriotic Americans who can’t wait for us to turn this country around. And the folks we don’t reach in person at these rallies, Friend, we’ve been reaching with our latest television ad blitz. With less than a week left until Election Day, this is where we urgently need your help the most. CONTRIBUTE $35 TO HELP FUND OUR FINAL AD BLITZ CONTRIBUTE $50 TO HELP TO PAY FOR A PRIME-TIME CABLE SPOT CONTRIBUTE $100 TO HELP SPREAD OUR MESSAGE ON SOCIAL MEDIA Friend, with the recent news of the FBI re-opening their investigation into Crooked Hillary’s emails, what do they know that we don’t? Hillary is running scared, and this ongoing investigation into her cover ups just proves that she is unfit and unqualified to be president. We cannot let her win Friend. Contribute $35, $50, or $100 right now to make sure she doesn’t. Friend, with your support today, we’re going to increase our television buy and reach even more voters nationwide before Election Day gets here. We’re going to convince America that what this country needs to begin fixing its problems is a successful businessman like my father. If we can’t trust Crooked Hillary with our nation’s top secret emails, then we definitely cannot trust her as our President. And with your help to fund this final ad blitz Friend, we’re going to win on November 8th. CONTRIBUTE $35 TO FUND OUR FINAL AD BLITZ. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 TO HELP FUND OUR FINAL AD BLITZ Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
