name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am asking you directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We are only four days out from Election Day, and the billionaires who are accustomed to buying our elections are spending millions of dollars against candidates who have had enough of the influence of big money in politics.
**Let's show the billionaire class that they can't have it all.**
We must do everything we can to help our candidates win on Tuesday. That is why I am asking you directly today to support these priority races:
[**Please make an immediate contribution of $3, or whatever you can afford, to the campaigns of Pramila Jayapal, Nanette Barragan, Morgan Carroll, Tom Nelson, Rick Nolan, Jane Kim, and Peter Jacob.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full")
Our struggle continues in state and local races across the country, and you can make a real difference in this election by supporting these seven candidates who are prepared to stand up to the billionaire class.
What we set out to do during our presidential campaign, and what we are continuing to do right now, is to transform American politics and show that when millions of people stand together, we can change this country for the better.
Your small-dollar donations are doing just that. Thanks to your support, we have helped these candidates run competitive races even with the grotesque amounts of money being spent to defeat them. They need our support now more than ever, which is why I am asking you to chip in right now:
[**Please split an immediate contribution of $3, or whatever you can afford, to the campaigns of Pramila Jayapal, Nanette Barragan, Morgan Carroll, Tom Nelson, Rick Nolan, Jane Kim, and Peter Jacob.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full")
Thank you for your continued support of our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-priorities?refcode=em161104-nd-full")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

| **For Immediate Release: **
November 4, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
_ethan@philscott.org_
_802-595-3776_
**High Road to Victory Tour Hightails into Days 6**
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott’s High Road to Victory Tour picks up speed going into the final stretch before the 14 county sprint on Monday.

“I am very proud of the campaign we have run and all of the work we have put in – it is unrivaled in this election,” said Scott. “Over the last five days, I have talked to countless Vermonters about my plans to grow jobs and opportunities and make Vermont more affordable. We’re going to run the last days of this election like any other race and have our fastest laps at the end,” Scott added.

The High Road to Victory Tour hits its peak on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans.

**Media is invited to join Phil and the team on the road. **

The schedule for Saturday, November 5th follows:

**_SATURDAY, NOVEMBER 5, 2016_**

10:00 a.m. Sign wave (Open Press)
Burlington High School, 52 Institute Rd., Burlington

11:15 a.m. Bagel Café and Deli (Open Press)
1127 North Ave., Burlington

12:15 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press)
Rt. 2A and Cypress St., Williston (in front of Chili’s)

1:30 p.m. Sign Wave (Open Press)
Burlington High School, 52 Institute Rd., Burlington

3:00 p.m. Shelburne Food and Wine Festival/Sign Wave
Shelburne Vineyard, 6308 Shelburne Road, Shelburne

5:30 p.m. Mad River Ridge Runners Raffle Dinner
American Legion,16 Stowe St, Waterbury
###

subject: Ensure Dems take back the Senate >>

body:
Friends,
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that a voter in New Hampshire is 17 times more likely than the average American voter to determine which party controls the Senate -- but a handful of recent polls show that if the election were held today, **my friend Maggie Hassan would lose.**
Everything is at stake, and time's running out to help Maggie pull ahead in New Hampshire's race that will determine the Senate majority and the future of the Supreme Court.
I can tell you from experience, it won't happen without your help: **Right-wing groups have spent $50 million on ads to defeat Maggie, and her team still needs $15,000 by midnight to stay on track.**
The only thing that will ensure Democrats take back the Senate is YOUR donation right now. **[I'm counting on you to give $3 or more to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc59/2a380d31/14b31d58/ff0415/4028047801/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0cG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

3. _**NOW:**_ The only way to stop Republicans from winning on Tuesday is to support a MASSIVE ground game across the map. _**(Just like we did in 2012!)**_
